name: Tuna Pasta Bake
recipeIngredient: 20 3/4 oz Condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup
14 oz Tuna Chunks, Drained and Flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta for 5 minutes in boiling water or until just tender. Drain and place in a large bowl.
2. Mix in the sweetcorn, frozen peas, condensed cream of mushroom soup, and 1 tablespoon of chives.
3. Spoon half the pasta mixture into an oven-proof dish. Spread half the tuna and tomatoes over the top.
4. Cover with the remaining pasta mixture, tuna, and tomatoes.
5. Roll out the pastry on a lightly floured surface to a 10-inch square.
6. Mix together the anchovies, tomato puree, and spread over the pastry, leaving 1 inch around the edges.
7. Dampen the pastry edges, roll up like a Swiss roll, and cut into 16 rounds using a small sharp knife. Place on a baking sheet and press down slightly.
8. Preheat the oven to 180°C/350°F/Gas Mark 4.
9. Scatter the grated cheddar cheese over the pasta mix and bake for 30 minutes.
10. Increase the oven temperature to 200°C/400°F/Gas Mark 6. Place the spirals in the oven with the pasta and bake for an additional 15 minutes until golden brown and hot and bubbling.
11. Arrange the spirals around the top of the pasta bake and scatter over the remaining chives. Serve at once.
